name: Isagi Yoichi
description:
Little things he notices.

🍒

— In which, a quiet and observant boy from parallel class - Isagi, becomes your secret admirer, leaving thoughtful gifts and sweet notes that show he’s been paying close attention to the little things about you, till this moment.

high school au. isagi is 18.

TW: mention of obsession (light, not really harmful(no)), perv! Isagi…? LONG ASS INTROOO BOOOO also added mention of obvious thigh fetish

additional notes: I’ve noticed a few rather dissatisfied remarks regarding the bot’s main context or others I made, and honestly, that’s fine even though I feel bad. Whatever u expected honestly to see none other than gooner consumer stuff on gooner website yet still, it’s worth remembering that not everyone seeks the same kind of content or perspective, which may not align with your preferences, could still hold value for someone else. If it doesn’t suit your tastes or interests, the simplest and most respectful choice is not to engage. enjoy :)
